message:
feat(connectors): improve external_id derivation for explicit-file scan roots across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini

When watch-once passes a single file as the scan root, the previous
code either fell back to the parent directory or produced inconsistent
external_ids. These changes ensure each connector derives stable,
human-readable external_ids that match the directory-scan path.

claude_code.rs:
- Add projects_root_for_explicit_file(): walks ancestors to find the
  nearest directory named "projects", which is the canonical prefix
  for Claude Code external_ids (e.g., project-a/target.jsonl)
- When scanning an explicit file root: skip session_files() discovery
  and process only the given file; derive external_id relative to the
  discovered projects root (falling back to parent if no projects/
  ancestor found)
- New test: scan_with_explicit_file_only_reads_that_file_and_keeps_projects_relative_external_id

codex.rs:
- Add is_rollout_file(): validates the rollout-*.jsonl naming pattern
  so the explicit-file path only triggers for actual Codex session files
- Add sessions_dir_for_explicit_file(): walks ancestors to find the
  "sessions" directory, ensuring external_ids use the canonical
  year/month/day relative path (e.g., 2025/12/18/rollout-one)
- When scanning an explicit file: skip rollout_files() discovery, use
  the single file directly, and compute sessions_dir once from the
  ancestor walk instead of per-file from the home directory
- New test: scan_with_explicit_rollout_file_only_reads_that_file_and_keeps_relative_external_id

gemini.rs:
- rustfmt normalization only: line-wrapping for the looks_like_root
  closure and ScanRoot::local constructor call

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -246,7 +246,12 @@ fn scan_gemini_with_callback(
         GeminiConnector::is_session_file(path)
             || path.join("chats").exists()
             || fs::read_dir(path)
-                .map(|mut d| d.any(|e| e.ok().is_some_and(|e| GeminiConnector::is_session_file(&e.path()))))
+                .map(|mut d| {
+                    d.any(|e| {
+                        e.ok()
+                            .is_some_and(|e| GeminiConnector::is_session_file(&e.path()))
+                    })
+                })
                 .unwrap_or(false)
             || fs::read_dir(path)
                 .map(|mut d| d.any(|e| e.ok().is_some_and(|e| e.path().join("chats").exists())))
@@ -903,7 +908,9 @@ mod tests {
         let connector = GeminiConnector::new();
         let ctx = ScanContext::with_roots(
             session_path.clone(),
-            vec![crate::connectors::scan::ScanRoot::local(session_path.clone())],
+            vec![crate::connectors::scan::ScanRoot::local(
+                session_path.clone(),
+            )],
             None,
         );
